$description: Architectural anti-patterns the doctrine forbids in code and content. Source: Part 1 §16. Any addition requires a Doctrine RFC per 00-audit-and-roadmap.md §12.2.

code.message: Raw hex colour found. Use a token reference: var(--cs-color-...) or import from @cyberskill/tokens.
Raw px in a style prop. Use a space token (--cs-space-N) or layout token.
Raw ms duration. Use a motion token: motion.duration.{fast|quick|standard|slow}.
Interactive <div> with onClick. Use <button> or @cyberskill/react Button — fails WCAG 2.1.1 Keyboard.
without alt attribute. Provide alt text or alt="" for decorative images — WCAG 1.1.1.

doc.message: Section reference detected. Cross-reference walker (RFC 2026-005 lint #4) verifies these exist.
